notes: Real news view counts are usually not public; this version uses open RSS sources and avoids paywalled links.
Add comma-separated RSS URLs to NEWS_FEED_URLS in .env.local to include TLDR-style newsletters or other readable feeds.
AI items must pass freshness and evidence-chain gates; application items need at least two anchors with one primary anchor.
First-read summaries and AI application risk analysis use DeepSeek only, not GPT; traceable source extracts are used when DeepSeek is unavailable.

articles.title: “塌方式”腐败！这个局局长、副局长、总工、处长、调研员全被查……“5.22”矿难追责持续
articles.highlight: 国家矿山安全监察局山西局两名局领导同日被查，均涉嫌严重违纪违法。
articles.summary: 7月20日，中央纪委国家监委驻应急管理部纪检监察组与山西省纪委监委通报，国家矿山安全监察局山西局党组成员、总工程师李忠有与副局长张成智，因涉嫌严重违纪违法被查。这是对“5.22”矿难事故的持续追责，凸显了国家对安全生产领域腐败的零容忍态度，值得关注。
articles.failureAnalysis: 此事件为反腐进展，并非项目失败。关键启示是安全生产领域的监管问责持续深化，腐败必须被严惩。
articles.sourceExcerpt: 7月20日，据中央纪委国家监委驻应急管理部纪检监察组、山西省纪委监委消息，国家矿山安全监察局山西局两名局领导同日被查：党组成员、总工程师、二级巡视员李忠有和党组成员、副局长张成智，均涉嫌严重违纪违法，目前正接受中央纪委国家监委驻应急管理部纪检监察组纪律审查和山西省监察委员会监察调查。

en.highlight: Two bureau leaders of the National Mine Safety Supervision Bureau Shanxi Branch were investigated on the same day, both suspected of serious violations of discipline and law.
en.summary: On July 20, the Central Commission for Discipline Inspection and the Shanxi Provincial Commission for Discipline Inspection announced that Li Zhongyou, Chief Engineer, and Zhang Chengzhi, Deputy Director of the Shanxi Branch, were under investigation for severe disciplinary and legal violations. This follows the "5.22" mine accident accountability, highlighting the government's zero-tolerance stance on corruption in workplace safety.
en.failureAnalysis: This event is an anti-corruption progress, not a project failure. The key takeaway is that supervision and accountability in safety production are intensifying, and corruption must be severely punished.
en.title: "Collapse-style" corruption! Two leaders of Shanxi Mine Safety Supervision Bureau investigated on same day

articles.title: 从夯实底座到深化应用 浙江加快推进开源体系建设
articles.highlight: 《关于加快推进浙江省开源体系建设的实施意见》即日起正式实施
articles.summary: 浙江省经信厅等7部门联合印发的《关于加快推进浙江省开源体系建设的实施意见》正式实施，该政策旨在从基础设施夯实到深化应用，全面推动开源体系建设。该新闻值得关注，因为它反映了地方政府对开源生态的战略支持，可能促进技术创新和产业数字化转型。
articles.failureAnalysis: 开源体系建设需要多方协同与持续投入，政策落地效果取决于后续执行与产业对接。

articles.title: Putin meets North Korean foreign minister in diplomatic push
articles.highlight: 朝鲜外务相崔善姬在无明显外交场合的情况下访俄，引发协调金正恩可能访俄的猜测。
articles.summary: 朝鲜外务相崔善姬访问俄罗斯并与普京会面，此次访问没有明确的外交事件背景，可能涉及协调朝鲜最高领导人金正恩未来访俄事宜，显示两国关系持续深化。
articles.failureAnalysis: 此次访问的时机不寻常，暗示朝俄可能在筹备更高层级的互访，值得关注后续发展。
articles.sourceExcerpt: The visit by North Korean Foreign Minister Choe Son Hui comes without an obvious occasion, such as a multilateral diplomatic event or state anniversary, and has raised speculation that she may be coordinating a possible visit to Russia by North Korean leader Kim Jong Un.

articles.title: Canada issues air quality warnings over US wildfire smoke after Trump tariff threat
articles.highlight: 官员表示，来自美国火灾的烟雾已越过边境，而几天前美国总统指责加拿大火灾管理不当。
articles.summary: 文章指出，加拿大不列颠哥伦比亚省因美国北部野火产生的烟雾发布空气质量警告，此前美国城市曾受加拿大火灾烟雾影响，特朗普因此威胁对加拿大加征关税。该新闻展现了环境事件与贸易政治的交织，值得关注。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键要点：跨国空气污染问题凸显环境与政治的相互影响，阅读本文可了解野火烟雾如何引发边境争端和贸易威胁。
articles.sourceExcerpt: Officials say smoke from US fires has crossed border days after US president accused Canada of improper fire management After days of acrid smoke from northern wildfires choking major US cities and inspiring Donald Trump to threaten Canada with tariffs, officials now say the reverse is also happening as parts of Canada issue air quality warnings caused by American fires to the south. Officials in the Canadian province of British Columbia warned in an alert on Saturday evening that smoke from US fires, spurred on by thousands of lightning strikes in the north-east, was creating smoky conditions as polluted air drifted north.

zh.title: 加拿大因美国野火烟雾发布空气质量警告 此前特朗普扬言加征关税
zh.highlight: 官员表示，来自美国火灾的烟雾已越过边境，而几天前美国总统指责加拿大火灾管理不当。
zh.summary: 文章指出，加拿大不列颠哥伦比亚省因美国北部野火产生的烟雾发布空气质量警告，此前美国城市曾受加拿大火灾烟雾影响，特朗普因此威胁对加拿大加征关税。该新闻展现了环境事件与贸易政治的交织，值得关注。
zh.failureAnalysis: 关键要点：跨国空气污染问题凸显环境与政治的相互影响，阅读本文可了解野火烟雾如何引发边境争端和贸易威胁。

en.highlight: Officials say smoke from US fires has crossed the border days after Trump accused Canada of improper fire management.
en.summary: British Columbia issued air quality warnings due to smoke from US fires, while earlier US cities were choked by Canadian wildfire smoke, leading Trump to threaten tariffs. This story highlights the intersection of environmental disasters and trade politics.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: Transboundary air pollution illustrates how environmental events can trigger political and trade tensions, offering insight into the nexus of climate and geopolitics.
en.title: Canada issues air quality warnings over US wildfire smoke after Trump tariff threat

articles.title: ray-r-ren/agent-apprenticeship
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: 该项目提出一个生态系统，让AI代理像学徒一样通过工作流循环执行任务、从反馈中迭代改进，并将完成的工作转化为经验和数据以提升未来表现。它值得关注，因为解决了代理缺乏持续学习能力的问题，可能推动自主代理的实用化。
articles.failureAnalysis: 失败风险包括：依赖高质量导师代理或人类反馈，成本高且难规模化；代理积累的经验可能过于特定，泛化到新任务时效果有限；评估标准和数据质量若不可靠，迭代可能偏离正确方向。此外，项目仍处早期，工程稳定性和社区生态尚未验证。
articles.highlight: AI代理通过工作流循环完成任务，并通过迭代执行改进，由导师代理或人类评估，将完成的工作转化为可复用经验和数据。
articles.sourceExcerpt: GitHub repository with 1322 stars and recent public activity. Description: The living ecosystem where AI agents complete tasks through workflow loops, improve through iterative execution, are evaluated by mentor agents or humans in the loop, and turn completed work into reusable work experience and data to improve future agents.

zh.title: 代理学徒制：AI代理的实战学习生态系统
zh.highlight: AI代理通过工作流循环完成任务，并通过迭代执行改进，由导师代理或人类评估，将完成的工作转化为可复用经验和数据。
zh.summary: 该项目提出一个生态系统，让AI代理像学徒一样通过工作流循环执行任务、从反馈中迭代改进，并将完成的工作转化为经验和数据以提升未来表现。它值得关注，因为解决了代理缺乏持续学习能力的问题，可能推动自主代理的实用化。
zh.failureAnalysis: 失败风险包括：依赖高质量导师代理或人类反馈，成本高且难规模化；代理积累的经验可能过于特定，泛化到新任务时效果有限；评估标准和数据质量若不可靠，迭代可能偏离正确方向。此外，项目仍处早期，工程稳定性和社区生态尚未验证。

en.highlight: AI agents complete tasks through workflow loops, improve through iterative execution, and are evaluated by mentor agents or humans, turning completed work into reusable experience and data.
en.summary: This project proposes an ecosystem where AI agents act as apprentices, executing tasks via workflow loops, iteratively improving from feedback, and converting completed work into experience and data for future agents. It is worth reading because it addresses the lack of continuous learning in agents, potentially advancing practical autonomous agents.
en.failureAnalysis: Failure may stem from high cost and scalability issues of relying on quality mentor agents or human feedback; poor generalization of task-specific experience; and reliance on reliable evaluation and data quality, which are unproven at scale.
en.title: Agent Apprenticeship: A Living Ecosystem for AI Agent Learning

articles.title: Phase-Field Simulation of Dendrite Evolution in All-Solid-State Sodium Batteries during Cycling
articles.selectionReason: Open full-text paper; topic energy; quality signal passed; application scenario is clear.

paperCard.problem: 全固态电池在循环充电时，金属钠会像树枝一样生长（枝晶），刺穿电解质导致短路。这个问题在钠电池中更难观察和理解。
paperCard.method: 用计算机模拟（相场模型）研究钠金属电极与多晶硫化物电解质界面在多次充电放电过程中的枝晶生长。模型输入参数来自更底层的量子力学计算（DFT）。
paperCard.difference: 以往模拟大多只算一次充电或者用液体电池，这个工作算多次循环，并且发现了剥离（放电）时枝晶没有完全消失，留下的钠碎屑会加剧下次充电的枝晶生长。
paperCard.innovation: 首次指出循环中残留的钠金属被晶界“卡住”，在后续充电时成为枝晶的种子，导致枝晶加速穿透。
paperCard.implementation: 使用COMSOL软件建立200微米×200微米的二维模型。用Allen-Cahn方程描述枝晶形状变化，用Butler-Volmer方程描述电化学反应速度，同时求解钠离子浓度和电场分布。关键的参数（如界面电子密度）从DFT计算得到。
paperCard.applications: 指导钠全固态电池的电极/电解质界面设计，例如通过调整晶界结构或合金负极来抑制枝晶，从而提高电池安全性和寿命。
technicalTerms: 相场模型：一种模拟材料微观结构随时间变化的数学方法，能区分枝晶和电解质。
枝晶：充电时金属在电极表面沉积形成的树枝状晶体，容易刺穿电解质。
DFT：密度泛函理论，一种从原子层面计算材料性质的量子力学方法。

articles.highlight: 本研究应用相场模型来理解和可视化钠全固态电池循环过程中的枝晶穿透行为。
articles.summary: 该论文通过相场模拟，揭示了钠全固态电池在充放电循环中枝晶持续生长的机制，发现剥离后残留的钠金属在晶界处被稳定化并重新激活，加速了枝晶穿透。这为设计更稳定的钠全固态电池界面提供了理论指导。
articles.failureAnalysis: 模拟假设没有副反应和化合物形成，实际电池环境更复杂；表面电子密度来自DFT计算，与实际界面可能有偏差。
articles.sourceExcerpt: Phase-Field Simulation of Dendrite Evolution in All-Solid-State Sodium Batteries during Cycling Chengyin Wu, † Wolfgang Windl, † Jung-Hyun Kim, ‡ and Yanzhou Ji ∗,† †Department of Materials Science and Engineering, The Ohio State University, Columbus, OH 43210 ‡Department of Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering, The Ohio State University, Columbus, OH 43210 E-mail: ji.730@osu.edu Abstract Dendrite growth during cycling remains a critical challenge for all-solid-state bat- teries (SSBs), limiting the full realization of their inherent safety and high energy density. In particular, the mechanisms of continuous dendrite penetration during charge-discharge cycling remain poorly understood and are difficult to characterize experimentally. This study applies a phase-field model, informed by density func- tional theory calculations, to rationalize and visualize the dendrite penetration be- haviors during cycling in sodium (Na) SSBs with pure Na or Na-Sb alloy anodes and polycrystalline Na 3SbS4 electrolyte.

zh.title: 全固态钠电池循环过程中枝晶演化的相场模拟
zh.highlight: 本研究应用相场模型来理解和可视化钠全固态电池循环过程中的枝晶穿透行为。
zh.summary: 该论文通过相场模拟，揭示了钠全固态电池在充放电循环中枝晶持续生长的机制，发现剥离后残留的钠金属在晶界处被稳定化并重新激活，加速了枝晶穿透。这为设计更稳定的钠全固态电池界面提供了理论指导。
zh.failureAnalysis: 模拟假设没有副反应和化合物形成，实际电池环境更复杂；表面电子密度来自DFT计算，与实际界面可能有偏差。

paperCard.problem: 全固态电池在循环充电时，金属钠会像树枝一样生长（枝晶），刺穿电解质导致短路。这个问题在钠电池中更难观察和理解。
paperCard.method: 用计算机模拟（相场模型）研究钠金属电极与多晶硫化物电解质界面在多次充电放电过程中的枝晶生长。模型输入参数来自更底层的量子力学计算（DFT）。
paperCard.difference: 以往模拟大多只算一次充电或者用液体电池，这个工作算多次循环，并且发现了剥离（放电）时枝晶没有完全消失，留下的钠碎屑会加剧下次充电的枝晶生长。
paperCard.innovation: 首次指出循环中残留的钠金属被晶界“卡住”，在后续充电时成为枝晶的种子，导致枝晶加速穿透。
paperCard.implementation: 使用COMSOL软件建立200微米×200微米的二维模型。用Allen-Cahn方程描述枝晶形状变化，用Butler-Volmer方程描述电化学反应速度，同时求解钠离子浓度和电场分布。关键的参数（如界面电子密度）从DFT计算得到。
paperCard.applications: 指导钠全固态电池的电极/电解质界面设计，例如通过调整晶界结构或合金负极来抑制枝晶，从而提高电池安全性和寿命。
technicalTerms: 相场模型：一种模拟材料微观结构随时间变化的数学方法，能区分枝晶和电解质。
枝晶：充电时金属在电极表面沉积形成的树枝状晶体，容易刺穿电解质。
DFT：密度泛函理论，一种从原子层面计算材料性质的量子力学方法。

en.highlight: This study applies a phase-field model to rationalize and visualize the dendrite penetration behaviors during cycling in sodium SSBs.
en.summary: This paper uses phase-field simulations to reveal the mechanism of continued dendrite growth in all-solid-state sodium batteries during cycling. It finds that residual sodium metal from stripping becomes kinetically stabilized at grain boundaries and reactivates during subsequent plating, accelerating dendrite penetration. The findings provide design principles for stabilizing anode/electrolyte interfaces.
en.failureAnalysis: The simulation assumes no side reactions or compound formation, which may oversimplify real batteries. The surface electron density from DFT calculations is an approximation for grain boundary interfaces.
en.title: Phase-Field Simulation of Dendrite Evolution in All-Solid-State Sodium Batteries during Cycling

paperCard.problem: Dendrite growth during cycling causes short circuits in all-solid-state batteries, especially problematic in sodium batteries as the penetration mechanisms are poorly understood.
paperCard.method: Phase-field simulations informed by density functional theory (DFT) are used to study dendrite evolution at the sodium metal/sulfide electrolyte interface over multiple charge-discharge cycles.
paperCard.difference: Previous phase-field models focused on single plating or liquid electrolytes; this work simulates cycling and discovers the asymmetric stripping behavior that leaves residual sodium metal, which seeds faster dendrite growth in later cycles.
paperCard.innovation: Identifies that residual sodium metal trapped at grain-boundary junctions becomes kinetically stabilized and acts as a reactivation source for dendrite penetration, a previously unrecognized failure mechanism.
paperCard.implementation: 2D simulations (200 μm × 200 μm) in COMSOL Multiphysics using Allen-Cahn equation for phase evolution, Butler-Volmer kinetics for electrodeposition, coupled with ion diffusion and electric potential. DFT provides the surface electron density at solid electrolyte interfaces.
paperCard.applications: Guide the design of sodium solid-state batteries by optimizing grain boundary structures or using alloy anodes to mitigate dendrite growth and improve cycle life.
technicalTerms: phase-field model: a computational method to simulate microstructure evolution by solving partial differential equations for order parameters.
dendrite: tree-like metal deposits that can penetrate the solid electrolyte.
DFT: density functional theory, a quantum mechanical method to calculate material properties from first principles.

articles.title: Show HN: Forge – Guardrails take an 8B model from 53% to 99% on agentic tasks
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + HN discussion
articles.summary: Forge是一个开源项目，通过添加护栏（guardrails）大幅提升小型语言模型在代理任务中的表现。在测试中将8B模型的准确率从53%拔高到99%，展示了护栏对模型可靠性的巨大改善。值得关注其在实际部署中的成本效益与可扩展性。
articles.failureAnalysis: 该方案依赖特定护栏设计，可能无法泛化至所有代理任务；99%的准确率可能仅在特定基准下达成，实际场景中效果或有折扣。护栏增加了工程复杂度，影响推理速度与灵活性；此外，过度依赖护栏可能导致模型自身能力退化，且高准确率可能带来过度承诺风险。
articles.highlight: Forge通过护栏机制将8B模型在代理任务上的性能从53%提升至99%。
articles.sourceExcerpt: HN candidate with public discussion metrics.

zh.failureAnalysis: 该方案依赖特定护栏设计，可能无法泛化至所有代理任务；99%的准确率可能仅在特定基准下达成，实际场景中效果或有折扣。护栏增加了工程复杂度，影响推理速度与灵活性；此外，过度依赖护栏可能导致模型自身能力退化，且高准确率可能带来过度承诺风险。

en.highlight: Forge's guardrails boost an 8B model from 53% to 99% on agentic tasks.
en.summary: Forge is an open-source project that dramatically improves small language model performance on agentic tasks by adding guardrails. It raises an 8B model from 53% to 99% accuracy in tests, demonstrating the power of constraints for reliability. Worth reading for insights on deployment cost and scalability.
en.failureAnalysis: The guardrails may be task-specific and not generalize; the impressive accuracy might be on a narrow benchmark. Added complexity impacts latency and flexibility, and over-reliance on guardrails risks model degradation and overpromising.
en.title: Show HN: Forge – Guardrails take an 8B model from 53% to 99% on agentic tasks
